name: G-9 sync with operator registries: standards-add --tree auto-scaffolds <inferred-namespace>/<id>.yaml per the §17 G-9 chain
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && touch .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-add.sh" --url https://docs.example.test/style --id example --tier 1 --applies-to typescript --source-namespace google --tree "$PWD/tree" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ -s tree/google/example.yaml ] && echo scaffolded 1>&2
